summary.zh: 二战前便已诞生的 1.5 升机械增压直列八缸“阿尔菲塔”，在 1950 年首届 F1 世锦赛上由朱塞佩·法里纳驾驭夺冠，是 F1 史上第一辆世界冠军赛车。
summary.en: The 1.5-litre supercharged straight-eight 'Alfetta' conceived before the Second World War carried Giuseppe Farina to the title in F1's first world championship season in 1950—the first world champion's car.

engine: Alfa Romeo 1.5L 机械增压直列八缸

content.zh:
1946 年战后重开的国际汽联把顶级方程式规则定为 1.5 升机械增压或 4.5 升自然吸气。阿尔法·罗密欧战前用于 voiturette 级别的 158（绰号“阿尔菲塔”）正好契合增压组别，凭借远超对手的比功率横扫赛场。

1950 年 5 月 13 日，首届 F1 世界锦标赛在英国银石发车。朱塞佩·法里纳驾驶 158 夺得杆位并赢下正赛，队友路易吉·法焦利获得亚军——这是 F1 世界锦标赛史上的第一场胜利。整个赛季阿尔法·罗密欧几乎不可撼动，法里纳最终加冕首届车手世界冠军。

158 的 1.5 升直列八缸配罗茨式机械增压器可压榨出四百多马力，代价是惊人的油耗与机油消耗。它是那个“增压啸叫”年代的代表，也定下了 F1“技术规格即规则核心”的传统。
content.en:
When the FIA re-opened grand prix racing in 1946, the top formula allowed 1.5-litre supercharged or 4.5-litre naturally aspirated engines. Alfa Romeo's pre-war 158 'Alfetta' fit the supercharged class and out-powered everything in sight.

On 13 May 1950 the first F1 World Championship race was held at Silverstone. Giuseppe Farina put the 158 on pole and won, with team-mate Luigi Fagioli second—the first win in world-championship history. Alfa Romeo dominated the season and Farina became F1's first world champion.

The 1.5-litre straight-eight, Roots-supercharged to well over 400 hp, traded power for prodigious fuel and oil consumption. It defined the supercharged era and set F1's tradition of rules built around a technical formula.
